__fixture__.name: cache_reset_candidate_cache_index_repair
__fixture__.scenario: A derived cache or search/graph index failed integrity checks or drifted off the loaded build's schema version. The rung rebuilds the disposable derived artifact from authoritative sources; authoritative profile data and user-owned files are never reset.

title: Cache / index repair via regeneration
summary: Regenerate a disposable derived cache or index after a schema-drift or integrity-failure signal. The reset is scoped to the storage class named in the evidence; authoritative profile data is never eligible.
preconditions: Supervisor or Doctor observed cache_integrity_failure, a cache_schema_version_drift finding, or a stale derived index reported by workspace_knowledge_workers.
The affected storage class resolves to a disposable_derived_cache in the support-bundle storage_context; authoritative user-owned state (profile, session_restore_store) is never eligible.

linkage_bindings.notes: The affected storage class ids appear in reset_candidate_storage_class_ids so bundle review sees the blast radius.
Doctor's schema-drift finding is the default trigger for this rung.
Escalation handoffs cite this rung when the authoritative profile schema drifts (profile_portability_schema_mismatch) rather than a disposable cache.
The regeneration transaction ref binds here and names the cache storage class being rebuilt.

explanation_fields.preserved_work_summary: Authored files, open buffers, trust, credentials, managed policy, session-restore state, and previously exported support bundles all remain untouched.
explanation_fields.disabled_capability_summary: Background rebuild, docs-pack live fetch, and AI runtime access pause while the cache or index regenerates from authoritative sources.
explanation_fields.escalation_summary: Escalate when the rung has been re-entered beyond its strike budget, when expected exact-undo semantics no longer hold, or when no local regeneration source exists (for example an authoritative profile drift).
explanation_fields.user_facing_next_step: Watch the reviewed regeneration preview; capabilities restore automatically after regeneration completes. If the rung refuses to apply because the affected storage class is authoritative, export a recovery-follow-up handoff packet instead.
